message: Operation 'get_license_findlicenseinrdf' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. data.current_summary: Guesses the license in an ontology or dataset.
data.current_description: Obtains a list guessed licenses in the Linked Data resource. Triples with the property dct:license etc. are scanned.
data.summary_suggestion: Detect licenses in RDF/Linked Data resources
data.description_suggestion: Analyzes an RDF document or Linked Data resource to detect and return a list of licenses. Scans for license-related triples using properties such as dct:license. Returns matched licenses with confidence information. Useful for automated license discovery in semantic web resources.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses vague term 'guesses' and doesn't clarify the input format. Description lacks clarity about what is returned and the operation's practical use. Improved version specifies RDF/Linked Data input, clarifies the scanning mechanism, indicates list output, and provides context for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Guesses the license in a text fragment.

data.current_description: Determines whether an RDF document conforms or not to the ODRL specification
data.description_suggestion: Validates an RDF document against the ODRL (Open Digital Rights Language) specification. Accepts an RDF document or ODRL fragment as input and returns validation results indicating conformance status. Returns detailed validation errors if the document does not conform to the ODRL specification. No state changes occur.
